name: Maskscar Plaza District
seasonal_change: Midyear observance turns the district into the loudest civic space in Psanan.
seasonal_effects: Midyear observance turns the district into the loudest civic space in Psanan.
Public schedules, prices, crowding, and enforcement intensity all change before locals bother explaining why.
Ceremony, supply pressure, and route reliability do not all peak at the same time, forcing local adaptation.
